title: StudioDash Visual Walkthrough
description: Take a visual tour of StudioDash and discover how each screen helps you monitor apps, revenue, websites, and connected developer services.
summary: Explore StudioDash through screenshots that showcase the dashboard, analytics, reporting, integrations, and provider health.

featureShowcases.heading: Your Dashboard at a Glance
featureShowcases.summary: The dashboard gives you an instant overview of your apps, revenue, websites, and connected services.
body: Everything begins from the StudioDash dashboard. Review your portfolio, monitor provider health, and identify the areas that need your attention before exploring more detailed analytics.
Designed for quick daily reviews, the dashboard helps you understand what's happening across your products without switching between multiple services.

featureShowcases.heading: Monitor Your Apps & Providers
featureShowcases.summary: Understand the health of your connected services and the performance of your apps.
body: StudioDash combines App Store Connect information with Provider Health, helping you quickly understand whether changes are caused by your products, connected services, or provider configuration.
Clear status information makes it easy to identify providers that are healthy, require attention, or are still waiting to be configured.

image.caption: Understand every connected service from one screen.

featureShowcases.heading: Understand Your Revenue
featureShowcases.summary: Track revenue across App Store Connect, advertising, and other connected services.
body: StudioDash helps you understand where your revenue comes from by combining provider information, historical trends, and reporting into one clear view.
Compare different reporting periods, identify unusual changes, and drill into the details whenever you need more information.

image.caption: Understand revenue trends across your portfolio.

featureShowcases.heading: Monitor Websites & Connected Services
featureShowcases.summary: Review website performance, search visibility, provider health, and synchronisation from one place.
body: StudioDash extends beyond app analytics by bringing together website traffic, search visibility, synchronisation status, and connected provider information.
Everything is designed to help you understand the complete health of your portfolio rather than viewing each service in isolation.

image.caption: Website analytics and provider health working together.

sections.heading: Take a Tour of StudioDash
paragraphs: These screenshots highlight the main areas of StudioDash, showing how the application helps developers monitor their apps, revenue, websites, and connected services.
Follow the journey from your daily dashboard through analytics, reporting, and operational insights to see how StudioDash brings everything together in one workspace.
